name: resource-consent-checker
description: Sanity-checks whether your proposed building work needs a resource consent or building consent under NZ council rules.
longDescription: You describe what you want to do (deck, fence, retaining wall, new dwelling, alteration, sleepout). The skill identifies which council you're in, references the relevant district plan rules and Schedule 1 of the Building Act 2004 (exempt building work), and tells you whether you likely need a building consent, a resource consent, both, or neither. It is advisory and conservative — when in doubt, it recommends ringing your council's duty planner.
